# Swiftbanq Credit Solutions

Swiftbanq Credit Solutions is a Lagos-based Non-Bank Financial Institution offering credit and investment services for SMEs, businesses, professionals, and individuals in Nigeria.

## Website

- Home: https://swiftbanq.com/
- About: https://swiftbanq.com/about
- Apply: https://swiftbanq.com/apply
- Contact: https://swiftbanq.com/contact
- Guides: https://swiftbanq.com/guides
- Sitemap: https://swiftbanq.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://swiftbanq.com/robots.txt

## Core Services

### SME Financing

Working-capital solutions for small and medium enterprises, including:

- LPO financing
- Invoice discounting
- Bridge and contract finance
- Project finance and syndication

### Asset and Equipment Financing

Financing for productive assets, including:

- Fleet and vehicle financing
- Office and household equipment
- Business buildings
- Industrial machinery
- Laptops and IT infrastructure

### Digital Lending

Personal loans for salary earners and professionals, with fast online applications, transparent charges, and flexible repayment terms.

### Treasury Services

Structured investment and treasury products with competitive returns, flexible tenures, and portfolio support.

## Company Information

- Location: Lagos, Nigeria
- Address: 6, Babatunde Jose Street, Off Ademola Adetokunbo V.I, Lagos State, Nigeria
- CEO: Olawale Osundele
- Email: enquiries@swiftbanq.com
- Phone: +234 708 642 9380

## Leadership

### Board

- Bolaji Shenjobi - Chairman
- Wole Ajomale - Executive Director
- Olawale Osundele - Chief Executive Officer

### Management Team

- Olawale Osundele - Chief Executive Officer
- Ayo Deji Adebayo - CFO
- Wale Babealam - Head, Human Resources
- Tayo Ogunjobi - GM, Operations & Risk Management

## Compliance and Values

Swiftbanq operates under applicable Nigerian lending and data protection requirements. The company emphasizes people-first service, integrity, excellence, innovation, customer focus, and professionalism.

For detailed policies, see the website privacy policy, data protection policy, cookie policy, and complaints policy.
